vitals.name: LCP
vitals.description: Largest Contentful Paint - time when largest element renders
vitals.optimization: Optimize images, reduce server response time, minimize CSS, defer non-critical JS

vitals.name: FID
vitals.description: First Input Delay - time from first interaction to response
vitals.optimization: Break up long JavaScript tasks, use web workers, lazy-load non-critical features

vitals.name: CLS
vitals.description: Cumulative Layout Shift - visual stability during page load
vitals.optimization: Reserve space for dynamic content, avoid unsized media, use transform animations
